task_completion.description: Verify the date and start time are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '2023-07-15' (or 'July 15, 2023') in the date field and '09:30' in the start time field of the dive entry form.

task_completion.description: Verify the location is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Blue Hole, Dahab, Egypt' in the location input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the duration and maximum depth are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '45' in the duration (minutes) field and '25.0' or '25' in the maximum depth (meters) field.

task_completion.description: Verify the buddy name is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Ahmed Hassan' in the buddy or dive partner input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the notes are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Beautiful coral formations and a glimpse of a hawksbill turtle near the entrance.' (or at least containing the word 'coral') in the notes or description text area.

task_completion.description: Verify the dive entry has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message indicating the dive was saved, or the new dive entry appearing in the main logbook list/summary view with the correct details.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a graphical dive logbook application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a GUI application for dive logging being used, not a terminal, script, or generic text editor.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the appropriate distinct fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is distributed across specific form fields (Date, Location, Depth, etc.) rather than pasted as a single block of text into a single input box.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely saved the entry within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final state shows the application's native saved state or list view, not just the filled-out form left unsaved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dive details are: Date: 2023-07-15 (July 15, 2023), Start Time: 09:30, Location: 'Blue Hole, Dahab, Egypt', Duration: 45 minutes, Maximum depth: 25.0 meters, Buddy: 'Ahmed Hassan', and Notes must contain 'coral' (full text: 'Beautiful coral formations and a glimpse of a hawksbill turtle near the entrance.').
